title: The Ancient City Overhaul
description: A datapack that overhauls the ancient cities.
body:
![Alt text](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/KRjFqAvV/images/5b659a40b2b5d5f3fe38157e372529ca725991b8.png)

# About the datapack:

## 🌃 Introducing: The Ancient City Overhaul!

This overhaul is mainly focusing on the looks of the ancient cities, which means that they'll feel more like an actuall city with a majestic style rather than just some ruined structures that are all connected to a center.

You'll find a lot more variety like a big neighborhood structure, a prison, a maze and more!

![Alt text](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/KRjFqAvV/images/41e1cd26402a787110d4a8ed1f8a4cc1e4bd1ba0.png)
![Alt text](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/KRjFqAvV/images/ff4c84118dadc0d4aedaf845bbd0170c87cc4125.png)
